title: Missing refresh token for Zoho Inventory OAuth2
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with Zoho Inventory using generic OAuth2, the error 'refreshToken is required' is displayed.
applies_when: Using generic OAuth2 for Zoho Inventory
API calls are directed to the incorrect domain
not_this_if: The correct domain is used for API calls
root_cause: The error occurs because the API calls are being made to the wrong domain, which does not support the required refresh token functionality. The standard API documentation may reference a different domain than what is needed for specific regions.
fix_steps: Change the API call domain from '.com' to '.com.au'
Retry the authentication process with the updated domain
agent_instruction: Update the API call domain to '.com.au' and attempt authentication again.
